policy.en: Auto-watch finds & ranks. Human approves join. Prize KYC is manual.
policy.ja: 自動監視で発見・採点。参加登録は人間が承認。賞金の本人確認は手動。
policy.zh: 自动监视发现与打分；报名需人工确认；奖金实名领取为手动。

recommended.title: NandaHack
nextSteps: 1. Open submitUrl and confirm eligibility (region, team size, theme).
2. Register with Miragea/Eliora identity (Devpost account).
3. Draft entry with Infinite Canvas / ComfyUI / GeekSpell brand edge.
4. Export stills + 30–90s demo from Eliora pipelines.
5. Submit before deadline; track in publish-manifest after ship.
